_comment: Per-GPU $/hr and fleet sizing for the B2 $/token / cost-at-SLO accounting (Initial Plan 2, Q2). 'fast' = RTX 6000 Ada / L40S tier on watgpu308; 'slow' = RTX A6000 (Ampere). usd_per_hr are representative cloud list prices (placeholders — refine with the price source you cite). 'count' is the simulated fleet mix; the all-fast reference re-sizes a fast-only fleet automatically.
